_comment: Per-file claim-status registry consumed by the semantic drift gate (tools/audit/semantic_drift_gate.py::_resolve_status). Provides a file-level fallback when a span has no inline `claim_status:` marker. Added 2026-04-21 for Canon Closure Protocol v1.0: files hosting C-001 Proved layer claims carry status 'proved' (ceiling 8); cross-substrate empirical reporting carries 'validated' (ceiling 6); operational canon documents carry 'measured' (ceiling 4).
